summary: Replace Victory paging with lower-effort Pointing_Up cross-center gestures and reserve Victory for future use.
scope: Map Pointing_Up left-to-right cross-center movement to Page Down and right-to-left movement to Page Up.
Retain the confidence, stability, start guard, minimum distance, horizontal dominance and release-to-rearm gates.
Keep strict OK pinch at higher priority than pointing.
Make Victory status-only without emitting page events.
validation: swift test passed 19 tests including Pointing_Up paging, release-to-rearm and inactive Victory
TypeScript typecheck and 32 Web regression tests passed
Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
Installed bundle reports version 0.7.1 build 11 and MediaPipe GPU reached ready state
notes: The MediaPipe model already provides Pointing_Up, so this change adds no inference cost.
macos-v0.7.0 remains the rollback point before this gesture remapping.
